title: adonis aestivalis subsp. parviflora
intro: Adonis aestivalis subsp. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered adonis or adonis pyrethrum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Adonis. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Adonis aestivalis subsp. parviflora include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Adonis aestivalis subsp. parviflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
